neighborhoods.title: Neighborhoods
neighborhoods.description: Neighborhood names to search (e.g. Astoria, Park Slope)

min_price.title: Min Price ($/month)
min_price.description: Minimum monthly rent to include in results

max_price.title: Max Price ($/month)
max_price.description: Maximum monthly rent to include in results

target_price.title: Target Price ($/month)
target_price.description: Ideal price used for ranking. Listings closer to this score higher.

availability_before.title: Available Before Date
availability_before.description: Only return listings available before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

max_subway_distance_miles.title: Max Distance to Subway (miles)
max_subway_distance_miles.description: Hard filter — listings beyond this distance are excluded

preferred_subway_lines.title: Preferred Subway Lines
preferred_subway_lines.description: Listings near these lines score higher (e.g. A, C, E, 1, L)

results_per_run.title: Results Per Run
results_per_run.description: Number of top-ranked results to return
